'''Lewis Peachey''' (born 25 March 2001) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|sr}} forward or {{rlp|pr}} for [[Midlands Hurricanes]] in the [[RFL League 1]] on loan from [[Sheffield Eagles]] in the [[RFL Championship]].

==Club career==
===Castleford Tigers===
On 22 April 2019, Peachey made his [[Super League]] début for [[Castleford Tigers|Castleford]] against the [[Catalans Dragons]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/match/EVP2921732|title=Super League: Catalans Dragons 37-16 Castleford Tigers|publisher=BBC}}</ref>

==== York City Knights (loan) ====
On 14 April 2021, it was reported that Peachey had signed for the [[York City Knights]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on an initial two-week loan.<ref>{{cite web|website=York Press|date=14 Apr 2021|accessdate=14 Apr 2021|title=York City Knights bring in Lewis Peachey on loan|url=https://www.yorkpress.co.uk/sport/19233039.york-city-knights-bring-lewis-peachey-loan/}}</ref> He made 2 appearances for the Knights before returning to Castleford.

==== Newcastle Thunder (loan) ====
On 14 December 2021, it was announced that Peachey had signed for the [[Newcastle Thunder]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on a season-long loan.<ref>{{Cite web |date=2021-12-14 |title=Peachey joins Newcastle on season loan |url=https://castlefordtigers.com/article.php?id=7795 |access-date=2022-04-05 |website=Castleford Tigers}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=15 Dec 2021|accessdate=24 Dec 2021|title=Castleford youngster Lewis Peachey makes Championship loan move|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/castleford-lewis-peachey-joins-newcastle-thunder/}}</ref> He was available to be recalled by Castleford and was still included in their squad for the season, retaining the number 27 shirt.<ref>{{Cite web|date=2022-01-21|title=Tigers reveal 2022 squad numbers|url=https://www.castlefordtigers.com/article.php?id=7841|access-date=2022-02-03|website=Castleford Tigers|archive-date=5 February 2022|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220205022008/https://www.castlefordtigers.com/article.php?id=7841|url-status=dead}}</ref>

====Midlands Hurricanes (loan)====
On 16 July 2025 it was reported that he had signed for [[Midlands Hurricanes]] in the [[RFL League 1]] on loan<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=16 Jul 2025|author=Ben Olawumi|title=Former Castleford Tigers young gun part of Championship-League 1 player swap deal|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/former-castleford-tigers-young-gun-part-of-championship-league-1-player-swap-deal}}</ref>
